generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder for motor shaft measuring position, velocity, and acceleration"
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder for gearwheel measuring position, velocity, and acceleration"
]

instance MotorEncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data transmitted via MQTT from encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Velocity data transmitted via MQTT from encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data transmitted via MQTT from encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data trace from motor, gearwheel, and system outputs with traceability to sources"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data trace from motor, gearwheel, and system outputs with traceability to sources"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb and Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualization of robot data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling of robot components using SysML BDD and IBD"
]

instance ContinuousFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models integrated with live operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through friction model correction"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shells"
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data streaming via MQTT protocol"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for physical relationship understanding"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from friction identification used to adjust robot control parameters for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control parameters based on friction model correction"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of physical system relationships for understanding"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interactions, as the digital shadow operates with one-way data flow and does not transmit data back to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing for friction model identification and motion control adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot first axis components (motor, gearboxes), sensor data streamed via MQTT, SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), and unified dashboard for data visualization and processing."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the digital shadow is used during robot operation for continuous friction model improvement and motion accuracy enhancement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data versus measured data to identify friction loss and ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) aligned with Industrie 4.0 standards and SysML for modeling."
]
